summary: R_p multiplier inconsistency resolved by standardizing to canonical R_p = 42.4 km. All multipliers in B2-G-002, B2-G-004, and B2-M-001 per_station entries are now computed as min_distance / 42.4 and rounded to 1 decimal place. Closest_station Ebro 444 km → 10.5×; farthest_station Canary 4,084 km → 96.3×. Per-station table updated identically. r_p_used_for_multipliers_km field added to both B2-G-004 and B2-M-001 to make the convention explicit.
note_to_decider: Rev2 of EXP-283 addresses all six curmudgeon-flagged blockers (ISS-1801..1806) from queue_id=294 review. Recommend (a) close all six issues as fixed-by-revision, (b) re-route EXP-283 to curmudgeon for confirmation pass before OTS anchoring (revision_required=false in tracker, requires_frozen_prediction_review=true unchanged). Do NOT proceed to OTS anchoring until curmudgeon confirms rev2 closes the blockers.
